title: bignonia australis
intro: Bignonia australis, also known as the Trumpet Vine or Coral Honeysuckle, is a woody, climbing vine native to the southeastern United States and Mexico. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, as well as its ability to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. The health benefits of Bignonia australis include reducing fever and relieving respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Bignonia australis is often prepared as a tea or infused in hot water to make a medicinal drink, and it can also be used in herbal remedies to treat various health conditions.
